zh.lifeSummary: 當Elizabeth-nic-William Crichton of Crichton - Countess of Huntly於1410年1月26日出生在蘇格蘭米德洛迪安克萊頓時，她的父親William Crichton 1st Lord Crichton27歲，母親Margaret Agnes Maitland25歲。她於1440年3月18日與Sir Alexander Seton 1st Earl of Huntly在蘇格蘭阿爾迪史爾亨特利結婚。他們至少是7個兒子和5個女兒的父母。她去世於1479年6月9日在蘇格蘭阿爾迪史爾亨特利享年69歲，埋葬在蘇格蘭米德洛迪安吉可紐頓 安德 易亞斯特 考爾德。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Elizabeth-nic-William Crichton of Crichton - Countess of Huntly于1410年1月26日出生在苏格兰米德洛迪安克萊頓时，她的父亲William Crichton 1st Lord Crichton27岁，母亲Margaret Agnes Maitland25岁。她于1440年3月18日与Sir Alexander Seton 1st Earl of Huntly在苏格兰阿爾迪史爾亨特利结婚。他们至少是7个儿子和5个女儿的父母。她去世于1479年6月9日在苏格兰阿爾迪史爾亨特利享年69岁，埋葬在苏格兰米德洛迪安吉可紐頓 安德 易亞斯特 考爾德。

nameMeanings.name: Crichton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Creighton
meanings: Scottish and Irish: habitational name from Crichton, near Edinburgh, first recorded c. 1128 in the form Crectune, in 1287 as Crecton, and in 1360 as Creychtona. The name is probably an early hybrid compound of Old Welsh creic ‘rock’ + Older Scots tun ‘farm, settlement’ (Old English tūn). In Ireland and Britain, this form of the name is now found chiefly in northern Ireland; the more usual Scottish forms are Crichton and Crighton .
Irish: sometimes used for Gaelic Ó Creacháin or Ó Criocháin (see Crehan ).
English: habitational name from Creighton in Staffordshire, named with Celtic creig ‘rock’ + Old English tūn ‘settlement’.

en.lifeSummary: When Elizabeth-nic-William Crichton of Crichton - Countess of Huntly was born on 26 January 1410, in Crichton, Midlothian, Scotland, her father, William Crichton 1st Lord Crichton, was 27 and her mother, Margaret Agnes Maitland, was 25. She married Sir Alexander Seton 1st Earl of Huntly on 18 March 1440, in Huntly, Aberdeenshire, Scotland. They were the parents of at least 7 sons and 5 daughters. She died on 9 June 1479, in Huntly, Aberdeenshire, Scotland, at the age of 69, and was buried in Kirknewton and East Calder, Midlothian, Scotland.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Elizabeth-nic-William Crichton of Crichton - Countess of Huntly est née le 26 janvier 1410, à Crichton, Midlothian, Écosse, son père, William Crichton 1st Lord Crichton, avait 27 ans et sa mère, Margaret Agnes Maitland, avait 25 ans. Elle a épousé Sir Alexander Seton 1st Earl of Huntly le 18 mars 1440, à Huntly, Aberdeenshire, Écosse. Ils ont eu au moins 7 fils et 5 filles. Elle est décédée le 9 juin 1479, à Huntly, Aberdeenshire, Écosse, à l’âge de 69 ans, et a été enterrée à Kirknewton and East Calder, Midlothian, Écosse.

de.lifeSummary: Als Elizabeth-nic-William Crichton of Crichton - Countess of Huntly am 26. Januar 1410 in Crichton, Midlothian, Scotland geboren wurde, war ihr Vater William Crichton 1st Lord Crichton 27 und ihre Mutter Margaret Agnes Maitland 25. Sie hat am 18. März 1440 in Huntly, Aberdeenshire, Scotland Sir Alexander Seton 1st Earl of Huntly geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 7 Söhne und 5 Töchter. Sie starb am 9. Juni 1479 im Alter von 69 Jahren in Huntly, Aberdeenshire, Scotland und wurde in Kirknewton and East Calder, Midlothian, Scotland begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Elizabeth-nic-William Crichton of Crichton - Countess of Huntly è nata il il 26 gennaio 1410 nel Crichton, Midlothian, Scotland, sua padre, William Crichton 1st Lord Crichton, aveva 27 anni e sua madre, Margaret Agnes Maitland, aveva 25 anni. Lei sposato Sir Alexander Seton 1st Earl of Huntly il 18 marzo 1440, nel Huntly, Aberdeenshire, Scotland. Erano genitori di almeno 7 figli e 5 figlie. Morì il 9 giugno 1479, nel Huntly, Aberdeenshire, Scotland, all'età di 69 anni, e fu sepolta a Kirknewton and East Calder, Midlothian, Scotland.

ja.lifeSummary: Elizabeth-nic-William Crichton of Crichton - Countess of Huntlyが1410年1月26日にスコットランドミドロスアンクリチトンで生まれた時，父William Crichton 1st Lord Crichtonは27歳，母Margaret Agnes Maitlandは25歳であった。1440年3月18日にスコットランドアバーディーンシュアイアハントリーでSir Alexander Seton 1st Earl of Huntlyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも7人の息子と5人の娘の親であった。彼女は1479年6月9日にスコットランドアバーディーンシュアイアハントリーで69歳で死去し，スコットランドミドロスアンキルクニュートン アンド エアスト カルダーにて埋葬された。

ko.Kirknewton and East Calder, Midlothian,: 스컷랜드 미들로스이언 커뉴턴 앤드 이스트 캘더
ko.lifeSummary: Elizabeth-nic-William Crichton of Crichton - Countess of Huntly(이)가 1410년 1월 26일 스컷랜드 미들로스이언 크리ch턴에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 William Crichton 1st Lord Crichton(은)는 27세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Margaret Agnes Maitland(은)는 25세였다. 그녀는 1440년 3월 18일 스컷랜드 압르디실르 헌틀리에서 Sir Alexander Seton 1st Earl of Huntly(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 일곱 명의 아들과 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1479년 6월 9일 스컷랜드 압르디실르 헌틀리에서 69세의 나이로 사망했으며 스컷랜드 미들로스이언 커뉴턴 앤드 이스트 캘더에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Elizabeth-nic-William Crichton of Crichton - Countess of Huntly nasceu em 26 de janeiro de 1410, em Crichton, Midlothian, Scotland, seu pai, William Crichton 1st Lord Crichton, tinha 27 anos e sua mãe, Margaret Agnes Maitland, tinha 25 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir Alexander Seton 1st Earl of Huntly em 18 de março de 1440, em Huntly, Aberdeenshire, Scotland. Eles tiveram pelo menos 7 filhos e 5 filhas. Ela faleceu em 9 de junho de 1479, em Huntly, Aberdeenshire, Scotland, com 69 anos, e foi sepultada em Kirknewton and East Calder, Midlothian, Scotland.

ru.Kirknewton and East Calder, Midlothian,: кирнютон анд эаст калдир, мидлотян, Шотландия
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Elizabeth-nic-William Crichton of Crichton - Countess of Huntly родилась 26 января 1410 г. в местности кричтон, мидлотян, Шотландия, её отцу по имени William Crichton 1st Lord Crichton было 27 лет, а матери, которую звали Margaret Agnes Maitland, 25. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir Alexander Seton 1st Earl of Huntly 18 марта 1440 г. в местности хантли, абирдиншир, Шотландия. У них было по крайней мере 7 сыновей и 5 дочерей. Она умерла 9 июня 1479 г. в местности хантли, абирдиншир, Шотландия в возрасте 69 лет и была похоронена в местности кирнютон анд эаст калдир, мидлотян, Шотландия.

Se casó con Sir Alexander Seton 1st Earl of Huntly el 18 de marzo de 1440, en Huntly, Aberdeenshire, Scotland. Fueron padres de por lo menos 7 hijos y 5 hijas. Murió el 9 de junio de 1479, en Huntly, Aberdeenshire, Scotland, a la edad de 69 años, y fue sepultada en Kirknewton and East Calder, Midlothian, Scotland.
